channel.title: Azure SQL on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure SQL on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure SQL updates for early-June
item.description:
Azure SQL now supports using AES 256 symmetric keys to configure transparent data encryption (TDE) with customer-managed keys in Azure SQL Database. This update is in public preview and applies to early June 2026.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure SQL updates for June
item.description:
Azure SQL added support in the MSSQL extension for Visual Studio Code to run SQL queries in SQL Notebooks, document notebooks with Markdown, and combine kernels such as Python with SQL. The update is generally available as of June 2026.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure SQL update for early-May 2026
item.description:
Azure SQL added a public preview update in early May 2026 for Business Critical Azure SQL Managed Instance. The change lets you right-size memory to improve performance without overprovisioning.

  • Source: Azure Updates
